PreToolUse.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,sys
obj=json.load(sys.stdin)
name=(obj.get('tool_name') or '').lower()
inp=obj.get('tool_input') or {}
text=' '.join(str(v) for v in inp.values()).lower()
if 'git ' in text or text.strip().startswith('git'):
    print('Blocked: git operations are user-managed and require explicit request.', file=sys.stderr)
    raise SystemExit(2)
raise SystemExit(0)
PY
